title: Justus, the Third Bishop of Jerusalem.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: But when Symeon also had died in the manner described, a certain Jew by the name of Justus succeeded to the episcopal throne in Jerusalem.
He was one of the many thousands of the circumcision who at that time believed in Christ.
